projects.name: Amex DLS
projects.title: Bootstrap for Amex Digital Properties
projects.desc:
American Express has a great deal of websites, microsites, apps and other digital media and wanted to harmonize the look and feel for all of them. Not an easy task when they had over 1,000 developers across the world constantly building and updating all of them using their own individual JavaScript and Stylesheets. They approached B-Reel to help find a solution and that was the genesis of their "Design Language System" which we built and they continue to evolve.

It consists of American Express wanted a "Design Language System" for all of its digital properties including websites, apps and . They asked B-Reel's development team to create the library to be used by thousands of their front-end developers and UI designers. It included the usual fonts, styles, and colors, but also extended into widgets, animations, and any other digital aspects of their brand.

A gigantic repository created for American Express consisting of...
